prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical portrait of an adult young East Asian woman sitting indoors on an ornate vintage rattan cane-back chair. She has long, voluminous black hair swept to one side, smooth fair skin, large dark eyes, and a gentle subtle smile while looking directly into the camera. She wears an oversized cream-colored off-shoulder fuzzy knit sweater that slips below both shoulders, creating a soft cozy fashion portrait; one knee is raised close to the camera and her hands rest naturally near the sweater hem. Use warm ambient indoor lighting, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, soft cinematic glow, elegant boudoir-inspired but tasteful styling. Background: beige wall panels, a carved wooden chair frame with woven cane texture clearly visible on the left, dark gray curtains on the right with a thin strip of daylight near the floor, wooden floor and muted rug details blurred in the distance. Composition: vertical 9:16 smartphone-style framing, subject centered slightly right, face in the upper middle, knee and sweater filling the foreground, intimate close-range perspective, 85mm portrait lens feel, high-resolution natural photography, no text, no watermark, no extra people, no distorted anatomy.
promptEn: Create a photorealistic vertical portrait of an adult young East Asian woman sitting indoors on an ornate vintage rattan cane-back chair. She has long, voluminous black hair swept to one side, smooth fair skin, large dark eyes, and a gentle subtle smile while looking directly into the camera. She wears an oversized cream-colored off-shoulder fuzzy knit sweater that slips below both shoulders, creating a soft cozy fashion portrait; one knee is raised close to the camera and her hands rest naturally near the sweater hem. Use warm ambient indoor lighting, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, soft cinematic glow, elegant boudoir-inspired but tasteful styling. Background: beige wall panels, a carved wooden chair frame with woven cane texture clearly visible on the left, dark gray curtains on the right with a thin strip of daylight near the floor, wooden floor and muted rug details blurred in the distance. promptZh: 创作一张照片级写实的竖屏肖像，主角是一位成年 年轻东亚女性，坐在室内的华丽复古藤编靠背椅上。她留着长而蓬松的 黑色 头发，侧向一边，皮肤白皙光滑，有着深邃的大眼睛，直视镜头时带着温柔而微妙的微笑。她穿着一件超大号米色露肩毛绒针织毛衣，毛衣滑落至双肩以下，营造出一种柔和舒适的时尚肖像感；一只膝盖抬起靠近镜头，双手自然地放在毛衣下摆附近。使用温暖的室内环境光，浅景深，真实的皮肤质感，柔和的电影感光晕，优雅且不失品味的闺房风格造型。背景：米色墙板，左侧可见清晰的雕花木椅框架及藤编纹理，右侧为深灰色窗帘，地板附近有一条细微的自然光，远处的木地板和柔和的地毯细节呈现虚化效果。构图：9:16 竖屏手机风格构图，主体略微偏右居中，面部位于上方中间，膝盖和毛衣填充前景，亲密的近距离视角，85mm 肖像镜头感，高分辨率自然摄影，无文字，无水印，无额外人物，无畸形解剖结构。
